ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial projection */,
  "measure" TEXT /* Name of the financial measure (e.g., Application sales projection, Cloud computing costs) */,
  "year_1" TEXT /* Projected value for Year 1 */,
  "year_2" TEXT /* Projected value for Year 2 */,
  "year_3" TEXT /* Projected value for Year 3 */,
  "year_4" TEXT /* Projected value for Year 4 */,
  "four_year_total" TEXT /* Total projected value over four years */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the projection */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the projection was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the projection */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the projection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost category (e.g., Cloud computing, Additional staffing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent cost category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_details" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial projection */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost category */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the cost is projected */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Projected amount for the year */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cost entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the cost entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_details_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_details_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES financial_projections ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_details_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES cost_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_details" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial projection */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the revenue is projected */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Projected revenue for the year */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revenue entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the revenue entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the revenue entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the revenue entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_details_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_details_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES financial_projections ("projection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial projection being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the projection */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the projection was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES financial_projections ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or initiative */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "allocated_budget" TEXT /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "actual_spent" TEXT /* Actual amount spent on the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the budget allocation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget allocation was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the budget allocation */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_details" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget allocation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the project entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the project entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_costs" (
  "project_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project cost entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost category */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the cost is allocated */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Allocated amount for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project cost entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the project cost entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project cost entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the project cost entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_costs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_costs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES cost_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_revenue" (
  "project_revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project revenue entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the revenue is projected */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Projected revenue for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project revenue entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the project revenue entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project revenue entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the project revenue entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_revenue_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project (e.g., project manager, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team assignment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the team assignment was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the team assignment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the team assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id")
)
